Video hosting and analytics for business: Video hosting and analytics for business. Manage your projects and media library.
To get your Wistia API access token:
1. Log in to your Wistia account.
2. Go to **Account Settings > API Access** (or visit https://my.wistia.com/account/api).
3. Click **Create Token** and give it a name.
4. Grant it the permissions you need (read/update/delete) and copy the token — it is only shown once.
5. Paste the token below.

Update the name or description of a vide: Update the name or description of a video or media file.
Create a copy of a video or media file,: Create a copy of a video or media file, optionally into a different project.
Permanently delete a video or media file: Permanently delete a video or media file from your account.
